# cancel(_:)

**Instance Method**

Cancels the generation of a thumbnail for a given request.

## Declaration

```swift
func cancel(_ request: QLThumbnailGenerator.Request)
```

## Parameters

- **request**: The thumbnail creation request that you want to cancel.
title: cancel(_:)
